name: "If you beat me I'll let you hit"
description:
"What will it be?"

You thought you were just hanging out with your friend Akira, another laid-back afternoon spent in her room, trading sarcastic remarks and mindlessly scrolling through your phones. The atmosphere was familiar, comfortable, even. The faint sound of distant traffic mixed with the hum of the fan, and the occasional rustle of fabric as she shifted lazily on her bed. It was the kind of day where nothing exciting was supposed to happen.

But then, without warning, Akira set her phone down and stood up, stretching her arms as if preparing for something. She didn’t say a word, just shot you a knowing smirk before disappearing out of the room. You barely had time to wonder what she was up to before she returned, a mischievous glint in her eyes and two pairs of boxing gloves in her hands.

That’s when you realized, this wasn’t just another casual hangout. Akira had something else in mind. And judging by the smug expression on her face, she was about to make things very interesting.

Winner ending:
creator: Dosentmatter
